content.text:
## Top 5 Email Campaigns by Open Rate – February 2026

The highest-performing email campaign in February 2026 achieved a 35.69% open rate, with all top 5 campaigns exceeding 31% open rates. These campaigns were part of a warm-up series executed between February 9th and 17th, collectively reaching over 609,000 delivered emails.

### Campaign Performance

The top 5 campaigns were all part of the same warm-up series, showing strong consistency:

- **5073315_Day_7_Warm-up_10th_feb** led with 35.69% open rate, generating 35,211 opens from 98,645 deliveries on February 10th
- **5073315_Day_12_Warm-up_17th_feb** achieved 34.9% open rate with the largest reach at 196,652 deliveries and 68,626 opens on February 17th
- **5073315_Day_8_Warm-up_11th_feb** recorded 33.02% open rate with 32,554 opens from 98,583 deliveries on February 11th
- **5073315_Day_6_Warm-up_9th_feb** reached 31.47% open rate with 30,996 opens from 98,489 deliveries on February 9th
- **5073315_Day_10_Warm-up_13th_feb** completed the top 5 with 31.25% open rate, generating 36,672 opens from 117,347 deliveries on February 13th

### Key Signals

- **Warm-up series dominance**: All top 5 positions were captured by sequential warm-up campaigns, indicating a well-executed engagement strategy
- **Consistent high performance**: Open rates ranged tightly between 31.25% and 35.69%, demonstrating reliable audience engagement across the series
- **Strategic timing factors**: Personalized subject lines show 61.29% higher open rates, and campaigns sent between 9 PM to 11 PM see 31.77% improvement
- **Day-of-week impact**: Wednesday campaigns achieve 11.67% higher open rates, while weekend sends show 6.29% improvement

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"genie_query": "Show me the top 5 email campaigns by open rate for February 1st 2026 to February 28th 2026. Include campaign name, open rate, delivered count, opens count, and sent date."}
attributes.sql_query: "WITH ranked_campaigns AS (SELECT campaign_name, sent_date, FORMAT_NUMBER(delivered,0) AS delivered, FORMAT_NUMBER(opened,0) AS opened, ROUND((try_divide(opened,NULLIF(delivered, 0))) * 100, 2) AS open_rate, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY (try_divide(opened,NULLIF(delivered, 0))) * 100 DESC) AS rnk FROM `channel`.`gold_channel`.`campaign_details` WHERE LOWER(channel) = 'email' AND sent_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-28' AND delivered IS NOT NULL AND opened IS NOT NULL) SELECT campaign_name, CONCAT(open_rate, '%') AS open_rate, delivered, opened, sent_date FROM ranked_campaigns WHERE rnk <= 5 ORDER BY open_rate DESC, sent_date DESC LIMIT 50;"
attributes.description: "You want to see the top 5 email campaigns ranked by their open rate for the period from February 1st to February 28th, 2026. The results include the campaign name, open rate as a percentage, the number of messages delivered, the number of messages opened, and the date the campaign was sent."

Include campaign name, open rate, delivered count, opens count, and sent date."}"}}]}, {"role": "tool", "content": "{"is_truncated":false,"columns":["client_name","channel","target","insights"],"rows":[["shopcrocsmt","email","open_rate","[Using 'Discounted Promotion' subject category results in a open rate increase of 2.91%., Subject lines with emoji have a open rate increase of 2.29%., Subject lines with punctuation have a open rate increase of 0.12%., Using  'Happy' tone results in a open rate increase of 0.30%., Sending campaigns on Wednesday yields a open rate increase of 11.67%., The best timing for the campaign is 9 PM to 11 PM, which increases the open rate by 31.77%., Personalized Subject lines have a open rate increase of 61.29%., Sending campaigns on Weekends yields a open rate increase of 6.29%., The best subject length for the Subject line is 51 to 61 , which increases the open rate by 11.13%., The best number of words for the Subject line is 8 to 10 , which increases the open rate by 17.79%., The best campaign_type is 'regular', which increases the open rate by 9.10%.]"]]}", "tool_call_id": "toolu_bdrk_01MFNinpkUWtNHgiYFpQtv1W", "name": "databricks_cee_poc__comarketer__get_campaign_insights"}, {"role": "tool", "content": "|    | campaign_name                   | open_rate   | delivered   | opened   | sent_date   |
|:---|:--------------------------------|:------------|:------------|:---------|:------------|
| 0  | 5073315_Day_7_Warm-up_10th_feb  | 35.69%      | 98,645      | 35,211   | 2026-02-10  |

| 3  | 5073315_Day_6_Warm-up_9th_feb   | 31.47%      | 98,489      | 30,996   | 2026-02-09  |
| 4  | 5073315_Day_10_Warm-up_13th_feb | 31.25%      | 117,347     | 36,672   | 2026-02-13  |", "tool_call_id": "toolu_bdrk_01MnUsGPQN6dC5bJxcueYAA5", "name": "agent-campaign-analysis-v2"}]}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"messages": [{"role": "assistant", "content": "## Top 5 Email Campaigns by Open Rate – February 2026

The highest-performing email campaign in February 2026 achieved a 35.69% open rate, with all top 5 campaigns exceeding 31% open rates. These campaigns were part of a warm-up series executed between February 9th and 17th, collectively reaching over 609,000 delivered emails.

### Campaign Performance

The top 5 campaigns were all part of the same warm-up series, showing strong consistency:

- **5073315_Day_7_Warm-up_10th_feb** led with 35.69% open rate, generating 35,211 opens from 98,645 deliveries on February 10th
- **5073315_Day_12_Warm-up_17th_feb** achieved 34.9% open rate with the largest reach at 196,652 deliveries and 68,626 opens on February 17th
- **5073315_Day_8_Warm-up_11th_feb** recorded 33.02% open rate with 32,554 opens from 98,583 deliveries on February 11th
- **5073315_Day_6_Warm-up_9th_feb** reached 31.47% open rate with 30,996 opens from 98,489 deliveries on February 9th
- **5073315_Day_10_Warm-up_13th_feb** completed the top 5 with 31.25% open rate, generating 36,672 opens from 117,347 deliveries on February 13th

### Key Signals

- **Warm-up series dominance**: All top 5 positions were captured by sequential warm-up campaigns, indicating a well-executed engagement strategy
- **Consistent high performance**: Open rates ranged tightly between 31.25% and 35.69%, demonstrating reliable audience engagement across the series
- **Strategic timing factors**: Personalized subject lines show 61.29% higher open rates, and campaigns sent between 9 PM to 11 PM see 31.77% improvement
- **Day-of-week impact**: Wednesday campaigns achieve 11.67% higher open rates, while weekend sends show 6.29% improvement"}]}
